text.title: API Contract-First Development Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by the observables defined in 02-output-contract.xml to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: verdict=fail; add oasdiff job before merge
verdict=fail; add examples for every operation
verdict=fail; wire codegen for at least one consumer

text.example: ci_diff_job present → examples_count=42 >= ops=18 → codegen_targets=[ts,py] → conclusion version-policy-declared → pass.
